rationale: Acting on Review 1 fixes real naming problems visible in the diff (class names lacking the Is- prefix used by IsUnipotent + every Mathlib Prop class in the imports; misleading field names like unipotent_radical_trivial : True and radical_trivial : True that overstate a placeholder; the oddly named trivial-rephrasing lemma with ' suffix), all of which are material under the naming rubric and would be wanted by a maintainer. Review 2 approves despite these, so the resulting PRs are not equally good.
